Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU), Georgia

Atlas Mentor specializes in guiding students through their MBBS study abroad journey, particularly at Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU), Georgia ensuring personalized and comprehensive support throughout the application and enrollment process.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Georgia
  • July 15, 2024
  • Home
  • Georgia
  • Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU), Georgia
# Georgia

Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU), Georgia

Tbilisi State Medical University, established in 1918 in Georgia, stands out as a prestigious institution for studying MBBS. Recognized by the World Health Organization and the Medical Council of India, it has a strong reputation for quality education. The university boasts a diverse student body, with international students comprising a significant portion. Offering competitive tuition fees, highly qualified faculty members, and a commendable global ranking, it is highly regarded in the field of medical education.

The university’s 6-year MBBS program is conducted in English, attracting students from various parts of the world. Graduates from Tbilisi State Medical University are well-prepared for careers in prominent medical institutions globally. Student organizations such as IFSMA and EMSA-TBILISI provide additional support and opportunities for professional growth.

Why Choose Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU)?

Choosing Tbilisi State Medical University offers a compelling blend of excellence in education, a robust infrastructure, and global recognition. As one of Georgia’s premier institutions, it combines affordable tuition with accreditation from the Medical Council of India and WHO, ensuring a globally recognized degree. With a diverse and experienced faculty, state-of-the-art facilities including fully furnished accommodation, and an English-medium instruction, Tbilisi State Medical University provides a nurturing environment for aspiring medical professionals. Its longstanding reputation, commitment to research, and extensive hospital partnerships further enhance the appeal for students seeking a comprehensive medical education.

  • World-class Education: Tbilisi State Medical University offers a high-quality learning environment.

  • Infrastructure: The university boasts a well-structured campus.

  • Global Ranking: It is globally recognized and ranked.

  • Affordable Fees: The university provides a cost-effective education.

  • Accreditations: Approved by the Medical Council of India and WHO.

  • Qualified Faculty: Experienced professors enhance the learning experience.

  • Advanced Facilities: Free training with state-of-the-art technology.

  • Accommodation: Fully furnished AC rooms with attached washrooms, separate for boys and girls.

  • Language: English-medium instruction eliminates language barriers.

  • Job Opportunities: Global career prospects, including in India.

  • Community: A large Indian student community fosters a homely atmosphere.

  • Cuisine: Indian and international food available in the university mess.

  • Reputation: Among Georgia’s oldest and most esteemed universities.

  • Research Focus: Emphasis on knowledge and research-oriented studies.

  • Transparency: Transparent procedures ensure student freedom and facility access.

  • Size: The largest government medical university in Georgia.

  • Hands-on Experience: Partnerships with major hospitals offer practical training.

  • Recognition: Acknowledged by EU Ministry of Education, Georgian Ministry of Education and Science, and Ministry of Health and Labour Affairs

Duration of MBBS at Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU)

The MBBS program at Tbilisi State Medical University in Georgia spans a total of six years. This duration is structured as follows:

  • Classroom Studies: Five years dedicated to theoretical and practical training within the university’s classrooms. Students receive comprehensive education in medical sciences and clinical practices.

  • Internship: Following the completion of classroom studies, students undertake a one-year internship. This phase provides hands-on experience in medical operations, surgeries, and other essential aspects of clinical training.

This structured program ensures that students not only acquire theoretical knowledge but also gain practical skills through real-world clinical experiences, preparing them thoroughly for their medical careers.

Eligibility Criteria of Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU)

The eligibility criteria for Tbilisi State Medical University in Georgia are as follows:

  • Age: Applicants must be at least 17 years old at the time of admission or by the end of that admission year.

  • Academic Qualification: Candidates must have secured at least 50% or more marks in their 12th board exams. They should have studied Biology, Physics, and Chemistry as main subjects from a recognized board.

  • NEET Eligibility: Students applying for MBBS admission must have cleared the NEET exam. This requirement has been mandatory since a notification issued by the Medical Council of India in 2018

Documentation Required for Admission at Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU)

To apply for MBBS education at Tbilisi State Medical University, prospective students must ensure they have the following documents ready:

  • Completed Application Form: Fill out the university’s application form with accurate personal and educational details.

  • Passport-sized Photograph: Provide a recent passport-sized photograph for identification purposes.

  • Copy of Citizenship Document: Submit a clear copy of your citizenship document, which can be either your passport or national identity card, verifying your nationality.

  • Copy of Secondary Education Certificate: Include a copy of your secondary education certificate from an accredited institution abroad, confirming completion of your high school studies.

  • School Leaving Certificate: Present a school leaving certificate issued by your previous educational institution, indicating your completion of studies and qualifications obtained.

  • Scanned Copy of Valid Passport: Provide a scanned copy of your current valid passport, ensuring that all personal details and photograph are clearly visible.

  • Certificates of Extracurricular Activities: If applicable, submit certificates documenting any extracurricular activities or achievements that highlight your skills and interests outside of academic studies.

  • Attestation and Notarization: Ensure that all documents are attested and notarized by the relevant authorities, verifying their authenticity and compliance with university admission requirements.

These documents are essential for the admission process at Tbilisi State Medical University, ensuring that applicants meet the necessary criteria and are prepared to embark on their medical education journey.

Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU) Ranking

Tbilisi State Medical University in Georgia holds a notable position in higher education rankings. It is ranked 7th in Georgia and holds the 6397th position globally. Renowned for its commitment to quality education, the university attracts students globally who aspire to pursue MBBS studies.

International Accreditations Earned by Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU)

  • World Health Organization (WHO) Recognition: Tbilisi State Medical University is recognized by the World Health Organization (WHO), highlighting its adherence to global standards in medical education and healthcare practices.

  • European Commission of Education Recognition: The university’s programs have earned recognition from the European Commission of Education, affirming their alignment with European educational quality frameworks.

  • World Federation of Medical Education (WFME) Recognition: Accreditation by the World Federation of Medical Education signifies that Tbilisi State Medical University meets international standards in medical training and curriculum development.

  • International Association of Universities Membership: As a member of the International Association of Universities (IAU), the university participates in a global network committed to promoting higher education cooperation and quality.

  • European Universities Association Membership: Membership in the European Universities Association (EUA) enhances the university’s collaboration opportunities with leading European educational institutions and facilitates academic exchange.

  • Signatory of the Bologna Declaration: By signing the Bologna Declaration, Tbilisi State Medical University aligns its medical curriculum with the standards set by the European Union, ensuring compatibility and recognition across European countries.

  • Recognition by the Medical Council of India (MCI): The degrees awarded by Tbilisi State Medical University are recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI), allowing graduates to pursue medical licensure and practice in India.

  • Educational Commission for Foreign Medical Graduates (ECFMG) Accreditation: Accreditation by the Educational Commission for Foreign Medical Graduates (ECFMG) validates the university’s medical programs for international students seeking to practice medicine in the United States and beyond

Faculties of Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU)

Tbilisi State Medical University boasts several faculties that cater to a wide range of medical disciplines:

  • Faculty of Medicine: Offers comprehensive medical education and training with a focus on clinical practice and research.

  • Faculty of Dentistry: Provides specialized education in dental sciences, preparing students for careers in oral health care.

  • Faculty of Pharmacy: Focuses on pharmaceutical sciences, equipping students with knowledge and skills in drug development, distribution, and patient care.

  • Faculty of Nursing: Prepares students to deliver high-quality nursing care through rigorous academic programs and practical training.

  • Faculty of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation: Specializes in rehabilitation sciences, helping students become experts in restoring physical function and improving quality of life for patients.

These faculties collectively contribute to Tbilisi State Medical University’s reputation for excellence in medical education and research, offering diverse opportunities for students pursuing careers in healthcare professions.

Student Life at Tbilisi State Medical University (TSMU)

Life at Tbilisi State Medical University hostels offers a supportive and enriching experience for international students. The hostels provide:

  • Excellent Infrastructure: Well-furnished rooms equipped with necessary amenities to meet the needs of international students.

  • Meal Facilities: Breakfast, lunch, and dinner are provided, ensuring students are well-nourished throughout their stay.

  • Vibrant Community: The university fosters a diverse and inclusive environment where students, faculty, and alumni interact freely. This community spirit encourages students to share their religious beliefs and cultural backgrounds in a respectful manner.

  • Beyond Classrooms: Students are encouraged to engage in extracurricular activities and cultural exchanges, enriching their overall university experience.

  • Cultural Meets and Conferences: Regular events are organized to promote cultural understanding and personal development among international students.

These aspects contribute to a fulfilling and supportive environment at Tbilisi State Medical University, ensuring that students not only excel academically but also grow personally and culturally during their time at the university.
